title: Department Manager Vacancy at Poojara Telecom Asia Pacific Associates - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Department Manager Vacancy at Poojara Telecom Asia Pacific Associates - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Poojara Telecom Asia Pacific Associates! We are hiring a Department Manager for our Chandigarh team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Poojara Telecom Asia Pacific Associates:
Poojara Telecom Asia Pacific Associates is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in Customer Service
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Chandigarh, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Poojara Telecom Asia Pacific Associates!
